_description: Nova AI Suite Knowledge Base Manifest -- catalogs every data file with metadata for the consolidated platform

files.description: Core recruitment industry knowledge including benchmarks, salary trends, channel performance, industry-specific data, and platform audiences. This is the primary knowledge base file merged into the top-level KB dict for backward compatibility.
files.source: Curated from industry reports, Joveo internal data, and public sources

files.description: Deep intelligence on 91+ recruitment advertising platforms including pricing models, audience demographics, targeting capabilities, performance benchmarks, and API availability.
files.source: Platform documentation, vendor contacts, and Joveo first-party data

files.description: Detailed recruitment benchmarks across 22 industries: CPA, CPC, CPH, time-to-fill, apply rates, conversion funnels, and cost-per-quality-hire metrics.
files.source: Appcast, Joveo, industry surveys, and aggregated job board data

files.description: Strategic intelligence for recruitment advertising: channel selection frameworks, budget allocation models, audience targeting strategies, and campaign optimization playbooks.
files.source: Joveo strategy team, industry best practices, case studies

files.description: Regional hiring intelligence: metro-level job density, cost-of-living adjustments, talent supply/demand ratios, commute patterns, and regional salary premiums for 100+ US metros.
files.source: BLS, Census, FRED, Adzuna, and proprietary metro analysis

files.description: Recruitment supply ecosystem data: publisher networks, programmatic buying landscape, supply/demand dynamics, and publisher performance benchmarks.
files.source: Joveo publisher network data, industry partnerships

files.description: Workforce trend analysis: remote work adoption, gig economy growth, skills gap data, generational workforce shifts, and DEI hiring trends.
files.source: Research reports, BLS projections, LinkedIn Economic Graph, industry surveys

files.description: Curated insights from 74 industry white papers and research reports including Appcast 2026 Benchmark Report (302M clicks, 27.4M applies, 24 occupations), and reports from SHRM, Gartner, Deloitte, and others.
files.source: 74 publishers including Appcast, SHRM, Gartner, Deloitte, LinkedIn

files.description: Proprietary Joveo 2026 benchmark data: first-party programmatic recruitment performance metrics, publisher-level benchmarks, and client aggregate performance data.
Google Ads 2025 recruitment benchmarks from Joveo first-party data: 6,338 keywords, $454K total spend, CPC/CTR statistics across 8 categories, and top-performing keyword analysis.
Aggregated external benchmark data from multiple third-party sources for cross-validation against Joveo internal benchmarks.
files.source: Industry reports, competitor analysis, public filings

files.description: Anonymized client media plan patterns and templates: successful campaign structures, budget allocation examples, channel mix recommendations by industry and role type.
International recruitment data sources for non-US markets: Eurostat (EU), ONS (UK), ABS (Australia). Includes channel benchmarks, API endpoints, and dataset references for future integration.

supplementary_files.description: Global publisher supply data for programmatic recruitment
Joveo publisher network configuration and performance data
Channel database with detailed platform specifications
Metropolitan area job density and labor market concentration data
Cached live market data from API enrichment calls
Nova AI learned answers from user feedback and corrections

scraped_data_files.description: Scraped salary benchmark data from public sources

refresh_strategy.description: Knowledge base refresh strategy for the consolidated platform

tiers.notes: Fetched live via API calls, cached 1hr in L1/L2
